ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Sep-22-2021 Continued To Dec-06-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Daniel Byrne, via CourtCall, for Heman Chow, Administrator.

Mr. Byrne begins by advising the court that he has filed an Inventory and Appraisal and a Spousal Property Petition with a hearing date on Dec-06-2021. The court reminds Mr. Byrne that some issues remain from the previous calling of this matter in July specifically, the filing of a Petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of Status, which have yet to be filed. Mr. Byrne reports that he filed the Spousal Property Petition as suggested by the court at the previous calling of this matter. The court instructs Mr. Byrne that he will be required to file one of the petitions previously mentioned, regardless. Mr. Byrne then reports that there have been issues in obtaining financial records from Charles Schwab and there had been a delay caused by the appointment of a new probate referee. The court then confirms with counsel that if the Spousal Property Petition is granted by the court, he intends to terminate this matter and reopen the post-deceased spouse's probate petition. The court then advises Mr. Byrne that he will not be required to file a Petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of Status by the next calling of this matter, as previously requested.

The Status of Close of Estate is continued to Dec-06-2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Saephan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Jul-28-2021 Continued To Sep-22-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Daniel Byrne, via CourtCall, for Heman Chow, Administrator.

Mr. Byrne begins by advising the court that the account statements from the financial institution from the decedent's date of death had been forwarded to the probate referee but that he was not aware that the referee had retired. Mr. Byrne then advises the court that a request for appointment of a new referee is pending in the court's e-filing queue. The court and counsel then discuss the issue with Bing Chow's estate specifically that distribution to that estate is not possible because it has been closed. The court advises counsel that it will need to consider the issue with Bing Chow's estate.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to September 22, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Mary Wiss. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: B. Tso. Not reported.
